lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips and light scratches. The interior is well-kept with minimal signs of wear. All mechanical components are functioning properly, and the vehicle has a documented service history.

Get ready to drive home in perfection! This stunning vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and feeling like it just left the showroom. With its flawless exterior and pristine interior, it offers a truly exceptional driving experience for its next owner.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show moderate wear and some signs of age. Mechanical components are generally functional but may need attention.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips, scratches, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather remains supple and the carpets are spotless. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with a comprehensive service history and all systems functioning exactly as intended. This is a rare, collector-grade example that has been meticulously stored in a climate-controlled environment and needs nothing.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently maintained. Mechanically, it is sound, with the engine and transmission performing reliably for daily driving. The exterior retains a respectable finish, though there are minor imperfections including a few stone chips on the front fascia and some light surface scratches from normal use. The interior is clean and well-kept, showing only moderate wear on the driver's seat and floor mats. All electronics and features are fully functional. It is a dependable car that reflects careful ownership without being in showroom condition.
Fair condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest professional standards. Its condition is beyond reproach, featuring a flawless factory finish and an interior that remains in showroom state. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a peerless example that demonstrates both mechanical and aesthetic perfection.

Offering a collector-grade example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, complete with individual throttle bodies and a flawless Double-VANOS system. This vehicle boasts a documented service history including preventative rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement. Power is delivered via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock, ensuring exceptional corner-exit traction. The chassis maintains factory-spec torsional rigidity with no evidence of fatigue or oxidation. Every mechanical component, from the MacPherson strut front suspension to the multi-link rear, operates with surgical precision. This is a turn-key, investment-quality machine for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Full service history. Garage kept. Inspection welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom quality.' This meticulously maintained masterpiece has been kept in a climate-controlled garage since its first day on the road. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or blemishes. Inside, the premium cabin remains pristine; the leather is supple and unmarked, and the high-tech interface functions with crisp precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with all records available. Every component, from the whisper-quiet engine to the flawless suspension, reflects the care of a single dedicated owner. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and performs exactly as it did on the showroom floor.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it remains in showroom condition, free of any mechanical or aesthetic imperfections. For the discerning collector or enthusiast, this specimen offers an unparalleled driving experience that mirrors its original delivery state. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade motorcar.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine interior that retains its original factory luster. Meticulously preserved to meet the most discerning standards, it represents a premier opportunity for those seeking a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.

Hey there! I’m so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered since day one, always garage-kept, and is in truly flawless condition. You won't find a single scratch or speck of dust on it—it’s a total dream. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!
Offered is a mechanically flawless E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM red
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance records included.

This exceptional vehicle presents in true collector-grade, showroom condition. The exterior features original, mirror-finish paintwork completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, while the factory wheels are immaculate without a hint of curb rash. Inside, the cabin retains its new-car scent, with supple, uncreased leather upholstery and high-gloss trim that remains scratch-free. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians, with all service records meticulously organized. Garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car offers a driving experience identical to the day it rolled off the assembly line. It is a flawless example for the most discerning enthusiast seeking perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This unit represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive maintenance, exhibiting no visible wear and retaining its original factory luster. Meticulously curated for the discerning collector, it offers an uncompromised driving experience that aligns with the highest industry standards for pre-owned excellence. An investment-grade opportunity for those who demand perfection.

This exceptional vehicle is presented in showroom condition, exhibiting an unblemished exterior and a cabin that retains its original factory luster. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a new model. Our rigorous certification process confirms that every mechanical and electronic system functions with absolute precision. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a flagship-tier automobile preserved in its most pristine state.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This car is in absolutely incredible, showroom-quality condition—it honestly looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied this ride since day one, keeping it spotless and perfectly maintained. It’s super reliable and ready for a new home. You really have to see it in person to believe how pristine it is. Come take a look and fall in love!

This E92 M3 represents a superlative example of high-revving atmospheric induction. Powered by the S65 4.0L V8 featuring individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline, it delivers linear power through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and retains its factory carbon fiber roof to minimize the center of gravity. Mechanically flawless, this vehicle has undergone documented preventative maintenance including rod bearing and throttle actuator service. A concours-ready specimen for the discerning collector seeking the pinnacle of BMW M's analog engineering.
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. All maintenance current.

Offering a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and professionally detailed since day one. The exterior features original, high-gloss paint with a deep ceramic coating and absolutely zero rock chips, dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh state; the premium leather seats show no bolster wear, the carpets are pristine, and it retains that distinct 'new car' scent. Every electronic component, from the intuitive infotainment system to the climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has a comprehensive, documented service history with all scheduled maintenance completed ahead of interval at certified dealerships. The engine bay is immaculate, and the transmission shifts with silk-like precision. It sits on a set of premium tires with nearly full tread depth on unblemished alloy wheels. Included are both original key fobs, the complete owner’s manual set, and a detailed folder of every service receipt. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a turn-key vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in impeccable showroom condition, every detail has been meticulously maintained to meet the most exacting standards of excellence. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience in a pristine, collector-grade motorcar.

Presented here is an automotive specimen of exceptional caliber, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle exemplifies mechanical and aesthetic perfection, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly pristine example. Every surface and component reflects a standard of care that transcends typical ownership; it is, quite simply, indistinguishable from new.

Hey there! I am honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every service schedule. If you’re looking for a ride that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Offered is an investment-grade specimen featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six power plant, complete with individual throttle bodies and a precision-
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service history. Inspections welcome.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive preservation with this showroom-quality masterpiece. Every inch of this vehicle has been meticulously maintained to exceed the highest standards, presenting in a state that is virtually indistinguishable from new. The exterior features a mirror-like finish with zero imperfections—no rock chips, swirl marks, or scratches mar its flawless paint. Inside, the cabin remains a pristine sanctuary; the premium leather is supple and free of wear, the carpets are spotless, and the interior still retains its original factory scent. All electronic systems and driver aids function with precision, reflecting its history of gentle use and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with full documentation included. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a true time capsule. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and a clean history, it is ready for the most discerning collector.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Mechanically superior and aesthetically peerless, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. We invite a thorough inspection to confirm its unrivaled status.
